ingredients.item:
650ml (1 pint 2fl oz) full-fat milk
200ml (1/3 pint) double cream
2 tsp rosewater
4 green cardamom pods, crushed, seeds ground with a pestle and mortar
1 tsp vanilla bean paste or the seeds scraped from 1 vanilla pod
2 tbsp clear honey, plus extra for drizzling
200g (7oz) pudding rice
50g (1¾oz) unsalted butter
grated rind of 1 lime
ingredients.original:
650ml (1 pint 2fl oz) full-fat milk
200ml (1/3 pint) double cream
2 tsp rosewater
4 green cardamom pods, crushed, seeds ground with a pestle and mortar
1 tsp vanilla bean paste or the seeds scraped from 1 vanilla pod
2 tbsp clear honey, plus extra for drizzling
200g (7oz) pudding rice
50g (1¾oz) unsalted butter
grated rind of 1 lime

ingredients.item:
50g (1¾oz) flaked almonds, toasted
50g (1¾oz) chopped shelled pistachio nuts
handful of dried edible rose petals
ingredients.original:
50g (1¾oz) flaked almonds, toasted
50g (1¾oz) chopped shelled pistachio nuts
